## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short`
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (or explain why it isn't below)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII in the diff
- [ ] `sentinel.example.yaml` updated if config schema changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added for user-visible changes
